summary: Iteration 27 - Three-phase frontend implementation testing complete. All features verified: (1) Notification system with bell icon, badge count, panel overlay, type-based colors, source labels (Herion), and 'Segna tutte lette' button. (2) Communication page with workspace context panel showing practice name, client, status, step, guidance, official action, and agent when email selected. (3) Auth flow state preparation with awaiting_authentication and submission_in_progress statuses in backend. 11/11 backend tests passed, all UI features verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in practice selector dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: Notification system properly implements type-based color config (amber=action, red=urgent, blue=Herion, green=success, purple=entity)
NotificationPanel correctly shows source labels (Herion, Sistema, Ente) based on notification type
Communication page workspace context panel correctly loads via getPracticeWorkspace API when email with practice_id is clicked
Context panel shows all required sections: practice context, guidance, official action, agent
Backend STATUS_LABELS, PRACTICE_STEP_MAP, and USER_STATUS_DISPLAY all include awaiting_authentication and submission_in_progress
OfficialStepCard shows 'Accedi e continua' CTA when ready_for_submission + requires_user_direct_step + credentials_required
seed_data_creation: Used existing practices and email drafts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested three new features: (1) Notification system - bell icon in sidebar header with unread badge, notification panel overlay with type-based colors and source labels, 'Segna tutte lette' button. (2) Communication page workspace integration - context panel on right side shows practice context, guidance, official action, and agent when email with practice_id is clicked. (3) Auth flow state preparation - backend has awaiting_authentication and submission_in_progress statuses with proper labels and colors. All features working correctly. Minor console warning in create draft form about span in option element.

details: Bell icon visible in sidebar header with data-testid='notification-bell'
Badge shows unread count (9+) with data-testid='notification-badge'
Click opens notification panel overlay
Panel opens with data-testid='notification-panel'
Shows 'Notifiche' header with unread count
'Segna tutte lette' button present with data-testid='mark-all-read-btn'
Notifications show title, message, source label (Herion), timestamp
Type-based colors working (success=green, info=blue, etc.)
Header shows 'Comunicazione' title
Stats show: RICHIEDONO AZIONE (18), INVIATE (2), BLOCCATE (5), TOTALI (33)
Filter tabs present: Tutte, Bozze, Revisione, Approvate, Inviate, Problemi
Filters work correctly with backend API
Email items show with status badges (Bozza, Approvata, Fallita, etc.)
Practice links shown in teal color, clickable
33 email items displayed
Shows 'Seleziona una comunicazione' when no email selected
Shows 'Vedrai il contesto della pratica collegata' guidance
PRATICA COLLEGATA section shows practice name and client
SITUAZIONE ATTUALE section shows headline and guidance
COSA FARE box shows next action
ENTE section shows entity name, who acts, SPID indicator
Agent section shows Herion Guard with status
Practice selector dropdown present with data-testid='draft-practice'
Subject input with data-testid='draft-subject'
Recipient email input with data-testid='draft-email'
'Crea bozza' button with data-testid='draft-create-btn'
Official Step card shows 'PASSAGGIO UFFICIALE' header
'CHI AGISCE ORA: Tu' prominent badge displayed
'Credenziali personali richieste (es. SPID)' message shown
'Vai al portale ufficiale' link present
awaiting_authentication status in STATUS_LABELS, PRACTICE_STEP_MAP, USER_STATUS_DISPLAY
submission_in_progress status in STATUS_LABELS, PRACTICE_STEP_MAP, USER_STATUS_DISPLAY
Proper Italian labels and colors configured
GET /api/notifications - returns list with proper structure
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all as read
GET /api/dashboard/stats - includes unread_notifications count
GET /api/emails/drafts - returns list with practice_id field
GET /api/emails/summary - returns counts for all statuses
GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace - returns full workspace data
